title: Bawsey SSSI
summary:
Bawsey is a 2.6-hectare (6.4-acre) geological Site of Special Scientific Interest east of Kings' Lynn in Norfolk, England. It is a Geological Conservation Review site.
This site has Quaternary till, unsorted glacial sediments, with a depth of up to 5 m (16 ft). It is separated from the main East Anglian till sheet, and it is the type site for the Bawsey Calcareous Till.
The site is private land with no public access.
